com.android.device.configuration

Аа BooleanProperty

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.android.device.configuration.Property<java.lang.Boolean>
      • com.android.device.configuration.BooleanProperty

  • public class BooleanProperty
extends Property<java.lang.Boolean>
    BooleanProperty is the class that implements the property of type Boolean.
